title: rhododendron hirsutum var. laciniatum
intro: Rhododendron hirsutum var. laciniatum, also known as the hairy rhododendron, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron hirsutum var. laciniatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various health issues.
